text.title: Facebook Ads Playbook Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real facebook-ads engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: New account launched at $500/day; account flagged; delivery halts.
antipattern.fix: Restart at 25-50% of target; +25% every 3 stable days.

antipattern.symptom: Audience Network delivers 80% of impressions; CTR <0.3%.
antipattern.fix: Exclude Audience Network until 30 days of cohort data justify it.

antipattern.symptom: iOS conversions look 40% below Android; CPA fake-spiked.
antipattern.root-cause: Domain not verified + AEM not configured.
antipattern.fix: Verify domain + configure 8 AEM events ranked by value before launch.
